allow:
Bash(gh pr create --title "upgrade: Laravel 5.8 → 11.x 全版本升级" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

- 完成 Laravel 5.8 → 6.x → 8.x → 9.x → 10.x → 11.x 全链路升级（跳过 7.x）
- PHP 版本要求从 7.2+ 提升至 8.2+
- 升级所有主要依赖包（nwidart/laravel-modules v11、yajra/datatables v10、maatwebsite/excel v3.1、spatie/laravel-backup v8、barryvdh/laravel-dompdf v2 等）
- 移除 africastalking/africastalking，升级 Guzzle 至 7.x
- 重写所有 Export 类适配 maatwebsite/excel v3.1 接口
- 清理未使用的 Vue 2.5 脚手架（从未实际集成到前端）
- 迁移 database/seeds → database/seeders，Model Factory 适配新语法
- 适配 Laravel 11 配置格式（Facade::defaultAliases、partitioned cookie、env-based hashing 等）

## 涉及的升级步骤

| 步骤 | Commit |
|---|---|
| 5.8 → 6.x（含 Export 重写） | `3a2f44b` |
| 6.x → 8.x | `188ee67` |
| 移除 africastalking，Guzzle 7.x | `c89e9bb` |
| 8.x → 9.x（PHP 8.1） | `bb07ab1` |
| 9.x → 10.x | `7062d90` |
| TrustProxies 适配 | `6cca1ea` |
| 10.x → 11.x（PHP 8.2） | `2474899` |
| 清理未使用 Vue 2.5 | `4d9a48b` |

## Test plan

- [x] `php artisan --version` 确认 Laravel 11.48.0
- [x] `php artisan route:list` 路由加载正常
- [x] `php artisan test` 测试通过（2 passed）
- [ ] 手动验证核心页面：登录、患者列表、预约日历、发票
- [ ] 验证 DataTables 数据加载正常
- [ ] 验证 PDF/Excel 导出功能

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(/tmp/measure_style.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
find /Users/xudong/git/dental-medical-managment-system/resources/views -name "*.blade.php" -type f -exec grep -l "<style" {} \\; | while read f; do
  # Count lines between <style and </style>
  lines=$\(sed -n '/<style/,/<\\/style>/p' "$f" | wc -l\)
  echo "$lines $f"
done | sort -rn | head -20
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/full_audit.py << 'EOFPY'
import re
import os
import glob

base_path = "/Users/xudong/git/dental-medical-managment-system"

# Get all blade files
blade_files = sorted\(glob.glob\(f"{base_path}/resources/views/**/index.blade.php", recursive=True\)\)

# Map of blade file to corresponding controller
blade_to_controller = {
    "appointments/index.blade.php": "app/Http/Controllers/AppointmentsController.php",
    "doctor_claims/index.blade.php": "Modules/Doctor/Http/Controllers/DoctorClaimController.php",
    "invoices/index.blade.php": "app/Http/Controllers/InvoiceController.php",
    "patients/index.blade.php": "app/Http/Controllers/PatientController.php",
    "medical_cases/index.blade.php": "app/Http/Controllers/MedicalCaseController.php",
    "lab_cases/index.blade.php": "app/Http/Controllers/LabCaseController.php",
    "expenses/index.blade.php": "app/Http/Controllers/ExpenseController.php",
}

for blade_file in blade_files[:10]:  # Check first 10
    rel_path = blade_file.replace\(base_path + "/resources/views/", ""\)
    
    with open\(blade_file, 'r'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    
    # Extract columns definition
    cols_match = re.search\(r'columns:\\s*\\[\(.*?\)\\]', content, re.DOTALL\)
    if cols_match:
        cols_block = cols_match.group\(1\)
        data_fields = re.findall\(r'\\{data:\\s*[\\'"]\([^\\'"]+\)[\\'"]', cols_block\)
        
        print\(f"\\n{'='*80}"\)
        print\(f"FILE: {rel_path}"\)
        print\(f"EXPECTED COLUMNS: {data_fields}"\)

EOFPY)

Bash(/Users/xudong/git/dental-medical-managment-system/scripts/venv/bin/python3 -c "
import time, os
os.environ['PADDLE_PDX_DISABLE_MODEL_SOURCE_CHECK'] = 'True'

from PIL import Image
from paddleocr import PaddleOCR

img = Image.open\('/Users/xudong/Downloads/微信图片_20260117142401_4479_104.jpg'\)

for max_side in [1200, 1500, 2048, 4096]:
    ratio = min\(max_side / max\(img.size\), 1.0\)
    new_size = \(int\(img.size[0]*ratio\), int\(img.size[1]*ratio\)\)
    img_r = img.resize\(new_size, Image.LANCZOS\)
    path = f'/tmp/ocr_test_{max_side}.jpg'
    img_r.save\(path, 'JPEG', quality=90\)

    ocr = PaddleOCR\(use_textline_orientation=False, lang='ch', ocr_version='PP-OCRv4'\)
    t0 = time.time\(\)
    r = ocr.predict\(path\)
    t1 = time.time\(\)
    boxes = len\(r[0].get\('rec_texts', []\)\)
    print\(f'{new_size[0]:>4}x{new_size[1]:<4}  {t1-t0:5.1f}s  {boxes} boxes'\)
" 2>/dev/null)
